message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on catch continue patterns

Fixed silent data loss from catch continue patterns:

netpoller.zig:
- Expired timer tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently skipping timers
- Ready thread tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently skipping threads

copy_ops.zig:
- List copying now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping items

glob_ops.zig:
- Path joining and glob match collection now panic on OOM instead of silently skipping matches

shelve.zig:
- keys() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping keys
- toOwnedSlice() now panics on OOM instead of returning empty array

All changed from 'catch continue' to 'catch unreachable'.
